query: SELECT id, name, email, openId, role, activo, createdAt FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%Stephanie%' OR name LIKE '%Julian%' OR name LIKE '%Julián%' OR email LIKE '%stephanie%' OR email LIKE '%julian%';
